title: cx Manifest v8
description: On-disk format for a cx bundle manifest (schemaVersion 8). Renames the adapter runtime metadata field to adapterVersion while preserving the current proof-path bundle contract for downstream consumers and LLMs.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Must be exactly 8.

bundleVersion.description: Bundle format version. Must be exactly 1.

projectName.description: Project name as declared in cx.toml.

sourceRoot.description: Absolute path to the source root at bundle time.

bundleDir.description: Absolute path to the bundle output directory.

checksumFile.description: Filename of the SHA-256 checksum sidecar (relative to bundleDir).

handoverFile.description: Filename of the shared handover artifact (relative to bundleDir).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the bundle was created.

cxVersion.description: Version of the cx CLI that produced this manifest.

adapterVersion.description: Version of the installed adapter package used during bundling.

checksumAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used in the checksum sidecar.

totalTokenCount.description: Total token count for all text content represented in this bundle.

vcsProvider.description: Version-control system detected at bundle time. 'none' indicates the filesystem fallback was used (no .git or Fossil repository found).

dirtyState.description:
Source-tree dirty-state at bundle time.

clean — no working-tree modifications; standard verified bundle.
safe_dirty — only untracked files were present; bundle integrity is unaffected.
forced_dirty — tracked files with uncommitted changes were bundled because the operator passed --force. The LLM must treat this bundle as containing uncommitted work.

modifiedFiles.description: Relative POSIX paths of VCS-tracked files that had uncommitted local changes at bundle time. Populated only when dirtyState is 'forced_dirty'; empty array otherwise.

sections.description: Ordered list of text-file sections in the bundle.

assets.description: Raw files copied into the bundle without Repomix rendering.

notes.description: Repository notes metadata recorded at bundle time so AI tooling can inspect the note graph without reparsing Markdown.

ManifestSettings.description: Snapshot of the cx configuration settings used to build this bundle.

globalStyle.description: Default Repomix output style for sections.

tokenEncoding.description: Tokenizer encoding used to produce exact token counts.

normalizationPolicy.description: Versioned policy describing how file content was normalized before hashing.

includeLinkedNotes.description: Whether linked notes were included in the bundle plan.

ManifestTrustModel.description: Explicit trust labels for the bundle proof surface and its upstream reasoning inputs.

ManifestTraceability.description: Explicit provenance hooks that explain how to audit bundle trust and agent decisions.

SectionRecord.description: A rendered text-file section and its file metadata.

name.description: Section name as declared in cx.toml [sections.<name>].

style.description: Repomix output style used to render this section.

outputFile.description: Filename of the rendered section output (relative to bundleDir).

outputSha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the rendered section output file.

fileCount.description: Number of source files embedded in this section.

tokenCount.description: Exact token count of the section's embedded source content.

files.description: Ordered list of source files embedded in this section.

ManifestFileRow.description: Metadata for one source file represented in the bundle.

path.description: Source-relative path of the original file.

kind.description: Whether this row represents text content or a raw copied asset.

storedIn.description: Whether the file is stored in a section output or copied verbatim.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the normalized packed content stored in the section output.

sizeBytes.description: Original source file size in bytes.

tokenCount.description: Exact token count of the source file content.

mediaType.description: MIME media type of the source file.

outputStartLine.description: First bare content line of the file block in the section output (null when span capture is disabled).

outputEndLine.description: Last bare content line of the file block in the section output (null when span capture is disabled).

provenance.description: Optional ordered markers describing why this file was included in the plan.

AssetRecord.description: A raw file copied into the bundle without Repomix rendering.

sourcePath.description: Source-relative path of the original file.

storedPath.description: Path where the file is stored in the bundle (relative to bundleDir).

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content.

mtime.description: ISO 8601 modification time of the source file.

provenance.description: Optional ordered markers describing why this asset was included in the plan.

NoteRecord.description: Repository note metadata captured for AI-first workflows.

fileName.description: Relative filename of the note within the notes directory.

tags.description: Note tags used for grouping and retrieval.

summary.description: Short summary extracted from the note body.

codeLinks.description: Repository-path-style wikilink targets found in the note body (e.g. src/auth/index.ts).

cognitionScore.description: Diagnostic cognition score computed from summary quality, structure, and evidence links.

cognitionLabel.description: Quality label derived from the cognition score.

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the note record was last written.
